case_title: AUISTIN, MICHAEL VS SF EMERGENCY MEDICAL ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AUISTIN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SF EMERGENCY MEDICAL ASSOCIATION CYPRESS PROFESSIONAL SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUISTIN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF EMERGENCY MEDICAL ASSOCIATION CYPRESS PROFESSIONAL SERVICES $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38.00, PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. (1) DEFENDANTS ADMITS TO MAKING ERROR IN PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT. (2) DEFT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF'S COURT COSTS. (3) DEFENDANTS AGREES TO TAKE FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY TO ANY POTENTIAL COSTS WHERE COLLECTIONS AGAINST PLFT. DUE TO DEFENDANTS ERROR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
